backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing per-player game state (health, ammunition, score, enemies defeated) with functions to start a game, take damage, recharge weapons, increase score, defeat enemies, and query state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering game initialization fix, Bond spy-thriller UI theme, and background music behavior.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, serving as a build/documentation reference for the project's frontend modules.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Timeless' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping a lazy-loaded Game component in an ErrorBoundary and Suspense with an InitialLoadingScreen fallback at 5% progress.
frontend/src/components/Arena.tsx: Three.js/Cannon.js 3D arena component that loads a skybox texture, renders walls and obstacles, spawns enemies, and fires onArenaLoaded and onEnemiesSpawned callbacks when ready.
frontend/src/components/CanvasErrorFallb: Bond-themed error UI displayed when the WebGL canvas fails to initialize, showing possible causes and retry/reload buttons.
frontend/src/components/Enemy.tsx: Individual enemy mesh component using shared BoxGeometry and MeshStandardMaterial for instancing, with userData set for raycast hit detection and a dynamic health bar overlay.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class component that catches runtime errors, displays a styled 'CRITICAL SYSTEM FAILURE' UI with optional stack trace details, and provides a reload/reset button.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game component that orchestrates the Three.js/Cannon physics scene, manages multi-stage initialization (canvas, physics, arena, player, enemies), and wires together HUD, background music, and game state.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Simple presentational component that renders a percentage-based health bar given current and max values.
frontend/src/components/HUD.tsx: Heads-up display overlay showing score, health bar, ammunition pips, crosshair, and a music mute toggle with current track label.
frontend/src/components/InitialLoadingSc: Full-screen loading screen shown before the game starts, featuring a Bond-style gun barrel animation, progress bar, and stage label over a background image.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: In-game loading overlay with progress bar, stage labels, retry count, and an error state with a retry button.
frontend/src/components/MuzzleFlash.tsx: Three.js mesh component that renders a textured muzzle flash sprite at the camera's gun position and fades it out over successive frames.
frontend/src/components/PerformanceOverl: Development-only overlay that displays FPS, frame time, and JS heap memory stats using the usePerformanceMonitor hook.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: Physics-based first-person player component handling movement, mouse-look, shooting via raycasting against enemy meshes, muzzle flash, and spawn callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated via Internet Identity) and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: A React hook that manages procedurally generated background music using the Web Audio API, supporting two tracks ('diehard' and 'bond') with mute toggling and automatic track switching based on game state.
frontend/src/hooks/useDependencyCheck.ts: A React hook that asynchronously verifies required dependencies (WebGL, Three.js, React Three Fiber, Cannon physics) are available, returning loading/ready/error state with a 10-second timeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnemies.ts: A React hook that manages a list of 5 enemies with positions and health, providing a `damageEnemy` callback that updates health and tracks destruction state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameInitialization: A React hook that orchestrates a multi-stage game initialization sequence (canvas, physics, arena, player, enemies) with per-stage timeouts, progress tracking, retry logic, and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: A React hook that manages local game state (health, ammo, score, enemies defeated) while syncing with a backend via `useBackendGameState`, exposing callbacks for damage, enemy defeat, and ammo decrement.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React hook and context provider that wraps the DFINITY AuthClient to handle Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence, exposing login status flags and the current identity.
frontend/src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor: A React hook that measures FPS, frame time, and JS heap memory using requestAnimationFrame, updating stats every second. Only active in development mode and exposes an exportStats utility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerControls.ts: A React hook that tracks WASD/Space keyboard input and mouse movement via event listeners, storing state in refs for low-latency access. Exposes current control state and a getMouseMovement function that resets delta after reading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating game state (start, damage, enemy defeat, score, weapon recharge) against a canister actor. Each mutation invalidates the cached game state query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeapon.ts: A React hook managing weapon firing logic with a configurable fire rate, muzzle flash timer, and mounted-state guard. Returns current weapon state and a fire callback that enforces the cooldown.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports the Cormorant Garamond font and game theme stylesheet, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines a James Bond–inspired dark/gold CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/styles/game-theme.css: Defines the James Bond / Die Hard visual theme with CSS custom properties, styled components for the start screen, title card, gun-barrel animation, loading screen, and Bond-styled buttons and overlays.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with Bond-themed colors (gold, charcoal), serif/mono font families, zero border-radius, gold box shadows, and custom Bond animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, documenting known issues (stuck initialization loop, canvas latency), existing features, and requirements for the Bond/Die Hard theme and game initialization fix.
